promotionDelta: Generate and verify source/package/registry/docs outputs and the public subpath export.
Record pointer capture, cancellation, keyboard, 44-pixel step controls, collapse, and restore behavior in supported browsers.
Complete manual screen-reader value, keyboard-only, speech, switch, touch, and forced-colors sessions for this Risk Class 2 component.
Record controlled/uncontrolled, RTL spatial arrows, localized values, 320 CSS pixel, and 400% zoom evidence.

Publish an approved Quality Passport and dogfood the generated output on the public site.
